parents.subject: LU-15358 tests: Variable incorrectly defined under sanityn

commit.subject: LU-15383 osd-ldiskfs: check .. upon object destroy
commit.message:
LU-15383 osd-ldiskfs: check .. upon object destroy

This is a debug patch, which check .. upon object destroy, this is
to see whether maloo test can catch such error.

Test-Parameters: fortestonly fstype=ldiskfs mdscount=2 mdtcount=4 testgroup=full
Signed-off-by: Lai Siyao <lai.siyao@whamcloud.com>
Change-Id: Ibbd19847a8fe78ca82b45c314936408991b34006
